title: Donut Smp Essentials
description: This texture pack has Donut Smp essentials which will help you raise your place on the leaderboards!
body:
Donut Smp essentials. This is an overlay with a load of useful features for the Donut Smp!

Contains features such as,                                                                          
• Low fire                                                                                                
• Small shield                                                                                             
• Small totem & Small pop                                                                                       
• Clear water, Brighter nether, Full bright, No fog, Unobtrusive rain and snow, No pumpkin overlay, Quiet explosions and No cave sounds                                                                                   
• No explosion particles, No smoke on fire, Reduced hit particles and crit particles and gui icons   
• No block breaking particles                                                                            
• Small utilities (Food,Pearls, etc)                                                                                                                                           

This pack is designed to provide loads of features to enhance your performance in crystal pvp and general minecraft. This pack comes with lots of features like small pop and small utils to provide max visiblity in combat along with features like clear water and full bright for general minecraft.
*DISCLAIMER* This texture pack is made for the Minecraft server the Donut Smp I am not affiliated with the Donut Smp in any way and this is not an official Donut Smp product.            
CREDITS                                                                                                  
Low fire, Small pop, Small shield from Itzrealme (zeq edit) youtube.com/watch?v=nJNW5WF-bOM

Clear water, Brighter nether, No cave sounds, Full bright, No fog, Unobtrusive rain, Unobtrusive snow,quiet explosions and No pumpkin overlay from vanillatweaks.net

No explosion particles, No smoke on fire, Reduced hit particles and crit particles, small totem , Gui icons and No Explosive Sounds from texture pack DonutCrystal

No block breaking particles from modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-block-break-particles

Small utilities from DonutCrystal and vanillatweaks.net
